channel.title: IP on Hi everyone. It's me, Tim.
channel.description: Recent content in IP on Hi everyone. It's me, Tim.

item.title: Resurrecting The Arcanum IP
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about resurrecting the Arcanum intellectual property.

item.title: Why Not Create A New IP Today?
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. It’s a fun Friday, so I want to tell you a story called.

item.title: Planning For A Sequel
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about planning for a sequel.

item.title: Sci-Fi vs. High Fantasy Settings
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about sci-fi versus high F fantasy settings, specifically in a new IP.

item.title: Adapting TTRPGs vs. Other IPs
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about adapting tabletop role playing games into video games versus adapting a non-game IP into a video game.

item.title: Working In Another's Game IP
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about working in another’s game IP.

item.title: My Games As Other Genres
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about modeling, constipation in role playing games e.

item.title: Using An IP In A Different Medium
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about using an IP in a different medium, and

item.title: IP Idea: Unknown Powers
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about an IP idea that I had for unknown Powers.

item.title: IP Idea: Magic Costs Dearly
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about another IP idea from my idea book.

item.title: Ideas For A Generic Fantasy RPG
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about some ideas for a generic fantasy RPG.

item.title: Relinquishing Creative Control
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about relinquishing creative control.

item.title: Another New IP Idea
item.description: Hi everyone, this is Tim. Today I want to talk about another new IP idea.

item.title: Prequels
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about prequels now I did a video on sequels and it’s linked below.

item.title: Player Expectations
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about player expectations.

item.title: An Example Of Making A New IP
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about making an IP an actual example.

item.title: Thoughts On A Temple Remake
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about my thoughts on a temple remake, a remake of Temple of Elemental Evil, with things I would like to do that either I ran out of time to do or wish

item.title: Thoughts On An Arcanum Remake
item.description: Hey everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about thoughts on an Arcanum remake.

item.title: Making And Maintaining An IP
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. And today I want to talk about making and maintaining an IP.

item.title: Thoughts On A Fallout Remake
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to answer a question from Evan shantlin Who, full disclosure, worked on QA on Fallout.

item.title: Troika's Post Apocalyptic Demo
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim.
